user.title: Configure Remote Boot Manager
user.description: If you need help with the configuration have a look here: {documentation_url}

data.generate_random_webhook_id: Generate a secure random Webhook ID

data_descripition.webhook_id: It is strongly recommended to change the Webhook ID to a custom, hard-to-guess continuous string to protect you from unauthorized access.

webhook_info.title: Generated Webhook ID
webhook_info.description:
Here is your securely generated Webhook ID and URL. Please copy it now as it will not be shown again.

**Webhook ID:**
`{webhook_id}`

**Full Webhook URL:**
`{webhook_url}`
